onboarding.choose_language:
🌙 Assalamu alaykum

I will remind you of prayer times, help you count missed prayers, and track your progress.

Choose your language to get started.
onboarding.intro:
🌙 Welcome

This bot helps you:

• View daily prayer times
• Get prayer reminders
• Calculate missed prayers (qaza)
• Mark prayers as completed

Shall we continue?
onboarding.privacy:
🔐 Privacy

The bot only stores what it needs to work:

• Telegram ID
• Selected language
• City
• Prayer and qaza statuses
• Reminder settings

Your data is never used for ads or shared with third parties.
onboarding.reminders:
⏰ Reminders

Should I send you prayer time reminders?

You can change this later in settings.
onboarding.done:
✅ All set

The bot is ready.

You can now view today's prayer times, add missed prayers, or use the calculator.
city.choose:

Your city is needed to show accurate prayer times.

privacy.text:
🔐 Privacy

We only store what the bot needs to work:

• Telegram ID
• Selected language
• City
• Prayer statuses
• Qaza prayers
• Reminder settings

Your data is never shared with third parties.
help.text:
ℹ️ Help

This bot helps you track prayer times and complete missed prayers (qaza).

Main sections:

🕌 Today's prayers — times and statuses
📌 My qaza — active qaza list
➕ Add qaza — add a single qaza
🧮 Calculator — calculate over a long period
📊 Statistics — overall numbers
⚙️ Settings — language, city, reminders
help.calc: 🧮 How does the qaza calculator work?
help.calc.info:
🧮 How does the qaza calculator work?

The calculator helps you calculate qaza over a large period.

The process has 5 steps:

1/5 — Choose period type
2/5 — Enter start date
3/5 — Enter end date
4/5 — Select prayers
5/5 — Review and confirm

For example, from 2020-01 to 2023-03 for Fajr, Dhuhr, Asr, Maghrib, and Isha — the bot will calculate each prayer separately.

Important: before adding a large number of qaza, the bot will ask for confirmation.
help.complete.info:
✅ How do I complete qaza?

This section lets you mark qaza prayers as completed.

The process is simple:

1. Choose which section you completed from
2. Select the prayer
3. Enter the count

Example:
Calculator → Fajr → 2

The bot will subtract that number from your active qaza list.

If you made a mistake, press «↩️ Undo» on the success screen.
error.api_prayer_times:
Temporary error loading prayer times.

Please try again in a moment.
error.wrong_date:
Invalid date format.

Please use YYYY-MM-DD format.

Example:
2026-04-28
error.wrong_month:
Invalid month format.

Please use YYYY-MM format.

Example:
2020-01
error.wrong_year:
Invalid year format.

Please enter a 4-digit year.

Example:
2020
error.end_before_start:
End date cannot be before start date.

Please enter the dates again.
error.future_date:
Cannot calculate qaza for a future date.

Please enter today's date or earlier.
error.count_too_large:
Active {prayer} qaza: {max}.

Please enter a number from 1 to {max}.
error.not_yours: This action does not belong to you.
admin.not_allowed: This section is for admins only.

In Telegram, I will only send prayer-time reminders.

All actions now happen in the Mini App. The bot will only send prayer-time reminders.
reminder.motivational_line: May this prayer bring calm and barakah. Try not to delay it without a reason.
